description: Implement GDPR-compliant Row-Level Security (RLS) in OrientDB to ensure an external partner user can only access profiles of American citizens. Create a role named 'us_analytics' (inheriting from 'reader') and a user named 'us_partner' with password 'password123' assigned to this role. Configure a security policy named 'us_only_policy' with a read predicate filtering for "Nationality = 'American'" and apply it to the 'Profiles' class for the 'us_analytics' role. Root credentials: root / GymAnything123!.
